query: I have a call with Chris tomorrow about the Assembly partnership. What's our current arrangement and what should I push for in terms of revenue split?
A small co-op in Ontario reached out asking about pricing. They have 8 members and want the basic governance package. What should I quote them?
I need to update the DM catalog entry for Live Wires. What's the current positioning and how does it fit into the overall product lineup?
We got a grant opportunity from the Canadian Worker Co-op Federation. They're funding cooperative tech tools. Should we apply? What's our pitch?
how much runway do we have left? I'm trying to decide if we can afford to hire a part-time designer for the Assembly UI
I need to write a proposal for Solid State. They want a full governance system buildout. What should I include in the scope and how do I frame the value prop?
Mario wants to know if we can white-label Assembly for his clients. What's our position on white-labeling and how would that work with the pricing model?
what's the conversion funnel between someone finding Live Wires and eventually becoming an Assembly customer? I want to tighten up that pipeline
I'm presenting at a cooperative conference next month. Can you help me put together talking points about Design Machines' approach to cooperative technology?
Ben suggested we should consider a freemium model for Assembly instead of subscription-only. What are the pros and cons given our target market?
The Templ template for the proposals page has a rendering bug. The status badges aren't showing the right colors
I need to write CSS for a new card component in Live Wires. It should have a subtle shadow and rounded corners
Can you help me set up the Docker development environment for Assembly? The go.mod file needs updating
What's the BC Co-op Act requirement for filing an annual report? Is there a deadline I should know about?
I want to write an article about Swiss modernist typography and how it influences our design work
help me debug this GraphQL query in Craft CMS. The eager loading on the entries query isn't working right
Can you review the accessibility of our Assembly dashboard? I think the color contrast might fail WCAG AA
I need to set up a Notion project board for tracking Assembly development tasks. What columns and properties should I use?
Write me a Go function that calculates patronage dividends based on member hours worked
Can you edit this blog post to match my writing voice? It sounds too corporate right now
